_meta.description: Queue of unresolved Menaion troparion entries requiring source research.

entries.name: Prophet Malachi; Martyr Gordius of Caesarea
entries.notes: Forefeast of Theophany begins Jan 2 on some typika; Jan 3 is a commemoration day. Troparion text not securely confirmed for corpus.

entries.name: Venerable George the Chozebite; Venerable Domnica of Constantinople
entries.notes: Afterfeast of Theophany. Rank 4 commemorations. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyr Polyeuctus of Melitene
entries.notes: Afterfeast of Theophany. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyr Tatiana of Rome
entries.notes: Leavetaking of Theophany on some typika. Tatiana of Rome. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Hieromartyr Clement of Ancyra; Martyr Agathangelus
entries.notes: Hieromartyr Clement (+296). Troparion text not securely confirmed for corpus.

entries.name: Venerable Xenia of Rome (Eusebeia)
entries.notes: Venerable Xenia (+5th c.). Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Venerable Xenophon and Mary, and their sons Arcadius and John
entries.notes: 5th-6th c. Constantinople. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Venerable Isidore of Pelusium
entries.notes: Isidore of Pelusium (+ca. 450), Egyptian monk and prolific letter-writer. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyr Agatha of Catania
entries.notes: Agatha of Catania (+251). Venerated in both East and West. Eastern Menaion troparion text not securely confirmed for corpus.

entries.name: Hieromartyr Blaise (Vlasios), Bishop of Sebaste
entries.notes: Blaise of Sebaste (+316). Widely venerated East and West. Eastern troparion text not securely confirmed for corpus.

entries.name: Venerable Martinian of Caesarea
entries.notes: Martinian of Caesarea in Palestine (+5th c.). Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Martyr Pamphilius and companions of Caesarea
entries.notes: Pamphilius (+309), presbyter and martyr of Caesarea in Palestine. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Hieromartyr Leo, Bishop of Catania
entries.notes: Leo of Catania (+8th c.), bishop and wonderworker. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Venerable Timothy of Symbola
entries.notes: Timothy of Symbola (+9th c.), hesychast of Mt. Olympus in Bithynia. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: St. Tarasius, Patriarch of Constantinople
entries.notes: Tarasius of Constantinople (+806), patriarch who presided at the Seventh Ecumenical Council (Nicaea II). Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Venerable Procopius of Decapolis
entries.notes: Procopius of Decapolis (+8th c.), confessor during the Iconoclast controversy. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Venerable Basil the Confessor
entries.notes: Basil the Confessor (+8th c.), companion of Procopius, confessor under Iconoclasm. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyr Hesychius of Antioch
entries.notes: Hesychius of Antioch (+303), martyr under Diocletian. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyrs Eutropius, Cleonicus, and Basiliscus
entries.notes: Eutropius, Cleonicus, and Basiliscus (+308), martyrs of Amasea, companions of Theodore Tyron. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyr Codratus of Corinth and companions
entries.notes: Codratus of Corinth (+258), martyr under Valerian. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyr Niketas of the Goths
entries.notes: Niketas the Goth (+372), martyred by the Arian Visigoth chieftain Athanaric. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyr Nikon and 199 companions
entries.notes: Nikon and companions, martyrs of Sicily (+251). Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Venerable Hilarion the New, Abbot of Pelekete
entries.notes: Hilarion the New (+754), abbot of the Pelekete monastery, confessor under Iconoclasm. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Hieromartyr Mark, Bishop of Arethusa; Deacon Cyril
entries.notes: Mark of Arethusa (+362), martyred under Julian the Apostate. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Venerable Titus the Wonder-Worker
entries.notes: Titus the Wonder-Worker (+9th c.), monk, confessor under Iconoclasm. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Venerable Nicetas, Hegumen of Medikion
entries.notes: Nicetas of Medikion (+824), abbot and confessor under the Second Iconoclasm. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Venerable George the Hagiorite (of Mt. Athos)
entries.notes: George the Hagiorite (+1065), Georgian monk of Mt. Athos, translator and churchman. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyrs Claudius, Diodorus, Victor, and Papias
entries.notes: Claudius, Diodorus, Victor, Papias and companions, martyrs of Corinth (+3rd c.). Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Venerable George of Maleon
entries.notes: George of Maleon (+10th c.), Byzantine hesychast. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyr Eupsychios of Caesarea
entries.notes: Eupsychios of Caesarea in Cappadocia (+362), martyr under Julian. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyrs Terence, Pompeius, and companions
entries.notes: Terence, Pompeius, and companions, martyrs of Africa (+3rd c.). Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Hieromartyr Basil, Bishop of Parium
entries.notes: Basil of Parium (+3rd c.), bishop and martyr. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Hieromartyr Symeon, Bishop of Persia, and companions
entries.notes: Symeon bar Sabbae (+341), bishop of Seleucia-Ctesiphon and martyr under Shapur II of Persia. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Venerable John, Disciple of St. Gregory the Theologian
entries.notes: John, disciple of Gregory the Theologian (+4th c.). Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Venerable John of the Old Lavra
entries.notes: John of the Old Lavra (+6th c.), Palestinian desert father. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyr Anastasia of Rome
entries.notes: Anastasia of Rome (+3rd c.), martyr. Rank 4. Distinct from Anastasia the Great Martyr (Dec 22). Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Hieromartyr Januarius, Bishop of Beneventum
entries.notes: Januarius of Beneventum (+305), bishop and martyr. Widely venerated in both East and West. Eastern troparion text not securely confirmed for corpus.

entries.name: Venerable Elizabeth the Wonder-Worker
entries.notes: Elizabeth the Wonder-Worker (+6th c.), abbess of Constantinople. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Hieromartyr Basil, Bishop of Amasea
entries.notes: Basil of Amasea (+322), bishop and martyr under Licinius. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Hieromartyr Simeon, Bishop of Jerusalem
entries.notes: Simeon of Jerusalem (+107), second bishop of Jerusalem, son of Cleopas, kinsman of the Lord. Martyred under Trajan. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyr Memnon the Wonder-Worker
entries.notes: Memnon the Wonder-Worker (+3rd c.), martyr. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyrs Timothy and Maura
entries.notes: Timothy and Maura (+286), martyrs of Egypt under Diocletian, martyred nine days after their wedding. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyr Pelagia of Tarsus
entries.notes: Pelagia of Tarsus (+3rd c.), virgin martyr under Diocletian. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyr Irene of Thessalonica
entries.notes: Irene of Thessalonica (+304), martyr under Diocletian. Rank 4. Distinct from Great Martyr Irene (Apr 16). Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyr Glyceria
entries.notes: Glyceria (+177), virgin martyr under Marcus Aurelius. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyr Isidore of Chios
entries.notes: Isidore of Chios (+251), soldier-martyr under Decius. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyr Theodotus of Ancyra
entries.notes: Theodotus of Ancyra (+303), innkeeper and martyr under Diocletian. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Venerable Peter of Caesarea in Cappadocia
entries.notes: Peter of Caesarea in Cappadocia (+9th c.), monk and confessor. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Hieromartyr Patrick, Bishop of Prusa, and companions
entries.notes: Patrick of Prusa (+4th c.), bishop and martyr. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyr Thallelaeus
entries.notes: Thallelaeus (+284), physician-martyr under Numerian. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyr Basiliscus of Comana
entries.notes: Basiliscus of Comana (+308), companion of Theodore Tyron, martyr. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Venerable Simeon the Stylite the Younger
entries.notes: Simeon Stylites the Younger (+592), stylite of the Wondrous Mountain near Antioch. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Sts. John the Russian and Constantine-Cyril Equal-to-Apostles
entries.notes: John the Russian (+1730), confessor slave in Ottoman Cappadocia. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyr Theodosia of Caesarea in Cappadocia
entries.notes: Theodosia of Caesarea (+308), virgin martyr under Maximinus. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Venerable Isaakios, Abbot of the Dalmatian Monastery
entries.notes: Isaakios of the Dalmatian Monastery (+383), confessor under Valens, founder of the Dalmatian monastery in Constantinople. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyr Hermias
entries.notes: Hermias (+2nd c.), soldier-martyr under Antoninus Pius. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyr Lucillian and companions
entries.notes: Lucillian and four young martyrs with him (+273), martyred in Byzantium. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: St. Metrophanes, First Patriarch of Constantinople
entries.notes: Metrophanes of Constantinople (+325), first patriarch. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Hieromartyr Dorotheus, Bishop of Tyre
entries.notes: Dorotheus of Tyre (+362), bishop and martyr under Julian the Apostate. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Venerable Bessarion of Egypt
entries.notes: Bessarion the Wonder-Worker (+4th–5th c.), Egyptian desert father. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Hieromartyr Marcellus, Bishop of Rome
entries.notes: Marcellus I, Bishop of Rome (+309), martyr. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyrs Alexander and Antonina
entries.notes: Alexander and Antonina (+4th c.), martyrs of Caesarea in Cappadocia. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyr Aquilina of Byblos
entries.notes: Aquilina of Byblos (+293), child martyr under Diocletian. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Blessed Augustine, Bishop of Hippo
entries.notes: Augustine of Hippo (+430), Doctor of the Western Church. Venerated in Byzantine Menaion on Jun 15. Eastern troparion text not securely confirmed for corpus.

entries.name: St. Tikhon, Bishop of Amathous in Cyprus
entries.notes: Tikhon of Amathous (+5th c.), Cypriot bishop and wonder-worker. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyrs Manuel, Sabel, and Ismael
entries.notes: Manuel, Sabel, and Ismael (+362), Persian martyrs under Julian the Apostate. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyr Leontius of Phoenicia
entries.notes: Leontius of Phoenicia (+2nd c.), soldier-martyr under Vespasian. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Hieromartyr Methodius, Bishop of Patara
entries.notes: Methodius of Olympus (+ca. 311), bishop and theologian, author of the Symposium. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyr Julian of Tarsus
entries.notes: Julian of Tarsus (+3rd c.), young martyr. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyr Agrippina of Rome
entries.notes: Agrippina of Rome (+3rd c.), virgin martyr. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Venerable Martyr Febronia of Nisibis
entries.notes: Febronia of Nisibis (+ca. 304), nun and martyr under Diocletian. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Venerable David of Thessalonica
entries.notes: David of Thessalonica (+6th c.), dendrite ascetic who lived in an almond tree. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Venerable Sampson the Hospitable
entries.notes: Sampson the Hospitable (+6th c.), physician-saint and founder of a hospice in Constantinople. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyr Hyacinth of Caesarea
entries.notes: Hyacinth of Caesarea (+108), martyr under Trajan. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Venerable Sisoes the Great
entries.notes: Sisoes the Great (+429), Egyptian desert father. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Venerable Paisios the Great
entries.notes: Paisios the Great (+400), Egyptian monastic, disciple of Pambo. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Forty-Five Martyrs of Nicopolis in Armenia
entries.notes: Forty-five martyrs of Nicopolis in Armenia (+319), burned alive under Licinius. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyrs Proclus and Hilary
entries.notes: Proclus and Hilary (+115), martyrs under Trajan. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Joseph of Arimathea and Nicodemus
entries.notes: Joseph of Arimathea and Nicodemus, those who buried Christ. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Translation of the Robe of Our Lord Jesus Christ to Moscow
entries.notes: Translation of a portion of the robe of Christ to Moscow (1625). Russian Orthodox calendar. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyr Emilian of Dorystolon
entries.notes: Emilian of Dorystolon (+362), slave-martyr under Julian the Apostate. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Venerable Macrina, Sister of Basil the Great
entries.notes: Macrina the Younger (+379), sister of Basil the Great and Gregory of Nyssa. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Venerable Symeon the Fool for Christ and John the Eremite
entries.notes: Symeon of Emesa (+590), holy fool for Christ, and his companion John the Eremite. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Hieromartyr Phocas, Bishop of Sinope
entries.notes: Phocas of Sinope (+117), bishop and martyr under Trajan. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Great Martyr Christina of Tyre
entries.notes: Christina of Tyre (+3rd c.), great martyr. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Hieromartyr Hermolaus and companions
entries.notes: Hermolaus and companions (+305), martyrs under Diocletian in Nicomedia. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyr Callinicos of Gangra
entries.notes: Callinicos of Gangra (+4th c.), martyr. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Righteous Eudocimus of Cappadocia
entries.notes: Eudocimus of Cappadocia (+9th c.), pious military officer. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Venerable Isaakios, Dalmatos, and Faustus
entries.notes: Dalmatos (+440) and Faustus, abbots of the Dalmatian Monastery in Constantinople. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: The Seven Youths (Sleepers) of Ephesus
entries.notes: The Seven Sleepers of Ephesus (+3rd c., awakened 5th c.). Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Venerable Martyr Dometios of Persia
entries.notes: Dometios of Persia (+363), monk and martyr under Julian the Apostate. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: St. Emilian the Confessor, Bishop of Cyzicus
entries.notes: Emilian of Cyzicus (+9th c.), confessor bishop under the Second Iconoclasm. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyr and Archdeacon Lawrence of Rome
entries.notes: Lawrence of Rome (+258), archdeacon and martyr under Valerian. Widely venerated East and West. Eastern troparion text not securely confirmed for corpus.

entries.name: Holy Martyr Euplus (Euplius) of Catania
entries.notes: Euplus of Catania (+304), deacon-martyr under Diocletian. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Deaconess Phoebe
entries.notes: Phoebe the Deaconess (Romans 16:1), one of the Seventy. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyr Myron of Cyzicus
entries.notes: Myron of Cyzicus (+3rd c.), presbyter-martyr. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyrs Floros and Lavros
entries.notes: Floros and Lavros (+2nd c.), stonemason-martyrs of Illyria. Rank 4. Patrons of horses in Slavic tradition. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyr Andrew Stratelates and companions
entries.notes: Andrew Stratelates (+4th c.) and 2,593 companions, martyrs of Cilicia. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyr Agathonikos and companions
entries.notes: Agathonikos and companions (+3rd c.), martyrs of Nicomedia. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Hieromartyr Eutyches, Disciple of John the Theologian
entries.notes: Eutyches (+1st c.), disciple of John and Paul, bishop and martyr. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Venerable Pimen (Poemen) the Great
entries.notes: Poemen the Great (+5th c.), Egyptian desert father, one of the most-quoted in the Apophthegmata Patrum. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Venerable Moses the Ethiopian (the Black)
entries.notes: Moses the Ethiopian (+ca. 405), former robber turned desert father in Scetis. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Sts. Alexander, John, and Paul the New, Patriarchs of Constantinople
entries.notes: Alexander (+340), John (+595), and Paul the New (+784), patriarchs of Constantinople. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyr Mamas of Caesarea
entries.notes: Mamas of Caesarea (+275), shepherd-martyr under Aurelian. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Hieromartyr Anthimos, Bishop of Nicomedia
entries.notes: Anthimos of Nicomedia (+302), bishop and martyr under Diocletian. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Hieromartyr Babylas, Bishop of Antioch, and companions
entries.notes: Babylas of Antioch (+250), bishop and martyr under Decius. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyrs Menodora, Metrodora, and Nymphodora
entries.notes: Menodora, Metrodora, and Nymphodora (+305), sisters and martyrs under Galerius. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Venerable Theodora of Alexandria
entries.notes: Theodora of Alexandria (+5th c.), penitent who lived in a men's monastery disguised as a man. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Hieromartyr Autonomus, Bishop
entries.notes: Autonomus (+4th c.), bishop and martyr in Paphlagonia. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Great Martyr Niketas the Goth
entries.notes: Niketas the Goth (+372). Also commemorated Mar 20. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyrs Sophia (Faith) and her daughters Vera, Nadezhda, and Lyubov
entries.notes: Faith, Hope, Love, and their mother Sophia (+137), martyrs under Hadrian. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: St. Eumenios, Bishop of Gortyna
entries.notes: Eumenios of Gortyna (+7th c.), wonder-working bishop of Crete. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyrs Trophimos, Sabbatios, and Dorymedon
entries.notes: Trophimos, Sabbatios, and Dorymedon (+276), martyrs under Probus. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Hieromartyr Phocas the Gardener of Sinope
entries.notes: Phocas the Gardener (+320), martyred at Sinope. Rank 4. Distinct from Phocas of Sinope the bishop (Jul 23). Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Venerable Euphrosyne of Alexandria
entries.notes: Euphrosyne of Alexandria (+5th c.), maiden who lived in a men's monastery as Brother Smaragdus. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyr Callistratos and companions
entries.notes: Callistratos and 49 companions (+304), martyrs under Diocletian. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Venerable Chariton the Confessor
entries.notes: Chariton the Confessor (+4th c.), founder of several lauras in Palestine. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Venerable Cyriacus the Anchorite
entries.notes: Cyriacus the Anchorite (+556), Palestinian desert father. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Hieromartyr Cyprian and Holy Martyr Justina
entries.notes: Cyprian and Justina (+304), martyrs of Antioch under Diocletian. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: St. Hierotheos, Bishop of Athens
entries.notes: Hierotheos of Athens (+1st c.), companion of Dionysius, ordained by Paul. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyr Charitina
entries.notes: Charitina (+304), slave and martyr under Diocletian. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyrs Sergios and Bacchus
entries.notes: Sergios and Bacchus (+303), soldier-martyrs under Maximian in Syria. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Venerable Pelagia the Penitent
entries.notes: Pelagia the Penitent (+5th c.), actress of Antioch who repented, lived as 'Brother Pelagios' on the Mount of Olives. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyrs Eulampios and Eulampia
entries.notes: Eulampios and his sister Eulampia (+311), martyrs under Maximinus Daza. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Venerable Euthymios the New of Thessalonica
entries.notes: Euthymios the New (+889), monk of Thessalonica. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Great Martyr Artemios of Antioch
entries.notes: Artemios (+363), military officer martyred under Julian the Apostate. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Venerable Hilarion the Great
entries.notes: Hilarion the Great (+371), founder of monasticism in Palestine, disciple of Anthony the Great. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Equal-to-the-Apostles Abercius, Bishop of Hieropolis
entries.notes: Abercius of Hieropolis (+2nd c.), bishop and wonder-worker, known from his famous epitaph. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Great Martyr Arethas and companions of Nagran
entries.notes: Arethas and the martyrs of Nagran/Najran in Arabia (+523), martyred by the Jewish king Dhu Nuwas. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyrs Marcian and Martyrios
entries.notes: Marcian and Martyrios (+351), lector and notary of the Great Church of Constantinople, martyred by Arians. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyr Nestor of Thessalonica
entries.notes: Nestor of Thessalonica (+306), young martyr, companion of Demetrios. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyrs Terence and Neonilla and their children
entries.notes: Terence, Neonilla, and their seven children (+3rd c.), family martyrs. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Venerable Anastasia of Rome
entries.notes: Anastasia the Roman (+3rd c.), nun who fled persecution and was martyred. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyrs Zenobius and Zenobia
entries.notes: Zenobius and his sister Zenobia (+285), physician-martyrs of Cilicia under Diocletian. Rank 4. Troparion text not securely confirmed.

entries.name: Holy Martyrs Acindynus, Pegasius, Anempodistus, Elpidiphorus, and Aphthonius
entries.notes: Persian martyrs under Shapur II. Rank 4 / Simple. Troparion text not confirmed from published Antiochian/OCA source for this corpus.

entries.name: Holy Martyr Acepsimas, Bishop of Persia, and his Companions
entries.notes: Persian episcopate martyrs. Rank 4. Troparion text not confirmed for this corpus.

entries.name: Holy Martyrs Galacteon and Episteme
entries.notes: Husband and wife martyrs. Rank 4. Troparion text not confirmed for this corpus.

entries.name: The Thirty-Three Martyrs of Melitene
entries.notes: Martyrs under Diocletian at Melitene in Armenia. Rank 4. Troparion text not confirmed for this corpus.

entries.name: Holy Martyrs Orestes and Erasmus of Ohrid
entries.notes: November 10 in the new-calendar Menaion also commemorates the Holy Martyr Orestes. Troparion text not confirmed for this corpus.

entries.name: Holy Martyrs Menas, Victor, and Vincent
entries.notes: Rank 4. Troparion text not confirmed for this corpus.

entries.name: Holy Martyrs and Confessors of Persia
entries.notes: November 15 commemorates a group of Persian martyrs. Rank 4. Troparion text not confirmed for this corpus. Note: November 15 is also the start of the Philip Fast (Advent fast) in Orthodox practice.

entries.name: Holy Martyr Plato of Ancyra
entries.notes: Martyr at Ancyra under Diocletian. Rank 4. Troparion text not confirmed for this corpus.

entries.name: Holy Prophet Obadiah (Abdias)
entries.notes: Prophet Obadiah. Rank 4. Troparion text not confirmed for this corpus.

entries.name: Our Father among the Saints Amphilochius, Bishop of Iconium
entries.notes: Amphilochius of Iconium, friend of the Cappadocian Fathers, +394. Rank 3. Also: Afterfeast of Entrance continues. Troparion text not confirmed for this corpus; the feast troparion (Entrance) would normally be sung alongside.

entries.name: Venerable Alypius the Stylite
entries.notes: Alypius the Stylite of Adrianopolis, +640. Rank 4. Troparion text not confirmed for this corpus.

entries.name: Our Father among the Saints Stephen the Younger, Martyr
entries.notes: Stephen the Younger, martyr under Constantine V Copronymus for veneration of icons, +764. Rank 4. Troparion text not confirmed for this corpus.

entries.name: Holy Martyr Paramon and his Three Hundred and Seventy Companions
entries.notes: Martyrs in Bithynia under Decius. Rank 4. Troparion text not confirmed for this corpus.

entries.name: Holy Prophet Nahum
entries.notes: One of the Twelve Minor Prophets. Rank 4. Troparion text not confirmed from published Antiochian/OCA source for this corpus.

entries.name: Holy Prophet Habakkuk
entries.notes: One of the Twelve Minor Prophets. Rank 4. Troparion text not confirmed for this corpus.

entries.name: Holy Prophet Zephaniah (Sophonias)
entries.notes: One of the Twelve Minor Prophets. Rank 4. Troparion text not confirmed for this corpus.

entries.name: Venerable Patapius of Thebes
entries.notes: Hermit of Constantinople, +7th c. Rank 4. Troparion text not confirmed for this corpus.

entries.name: Holy Martyrs Menas, Hermogenes, and Eugraphus
entries.notes: Martyrs at Alexandria. Rank 4. Troparion text not confirmed for this corpus.

entries.name: Holy Martyr Lucy of Syracuse
entries.notes: Holy Virgin Martyr Lucy of Syracuse, +304. Rank 4. Troparion text not confirmed from published Antiochian/OCA source for this corpus.

entries.name: Holy Martyrs Thyrsus, Leucius, and Philemon
entries.notes: Martyrs at Caesarea in Phrygia. Rank 4. Troparion text not confirmed for this corpus.

entries.name: Venerable Stephen the Sabaite, Hymnographer
entries.notes: Stephen the Younger, monk of the Great Laura and hymnographer, +794. Rank 4. Troparion text not confirmed for this corpus.

entries.name: Holy Prophet Haggai
entries.notes: One of the Twelve Minor Prophets. Rank 4. Troparion text not confirmed for this corpus.

entries.name: Holy Martyr Sebastian and his Companions
entries.notes: Martyr Sebastian of Rome, +288. Rank 4. Troparion text not confirmed from published Antiochian/OCA source for this corpus.

entries.name: Holy Martyr Boniface of Tarsus
entries.notes: Martyr at Tarsus in Cilicia. Rank 4. Troparion text not confirmed for this corpus.

entries.name: The Ten Holy Martyrs of Crete
entries.notes: The Ten Martyrs of Crete who suffered under Decius. Rank 4. Forefeast also continues. Troparion text not confirmed for this corpus.

entries.name: The Twenty Thousand Holy Martyrs Burned in Nicomedia
entries.notes: The twenty thousand martyrs who were burned in a church in Nicomedia on Christmas Day 302 under Diocletian. Rank 3. Troparion text not confirmed from published Antiochian/OCA source for this corpus.

entries.name: Holy Martyr Anysia of Thessalonica
entries.notes: Holy Martyr Anysia of Thessalonica, +285. Rank 4. Troparion text not confirmed for this corpus.

entries.name: Venerable Melania the Younger, Roman
entries.notes: Venerable Melania the Younger, foundress of monasteries in Jerusalem, +439. Rank 4. Last day of the Afterfeast of Christmas in many traditions. Troparion text not confirmed for this corpus.
